# acme

> Repo: https://github.com/example/acme

acme is a CLI that syncs a directory to a bucket. Each epic's stories live in its file under `epics/`; this list is the order and the MVP cut.

## Roadmap

- [x] **EA: Walking skeleton** — acme installs and runs end-to-end doing almost nothing. → [EA](epics/EA-walking-skeleton.md)
- [ ] **EB: Sync core** — one-way directory sync works against a real bucket. → [EB](epics/EB-sync-core.md)

---
*MVP line — EA–EB ship as v0.1: install and sync.*
